data.title: USDOT Secretary Sean Duffy Says 'Less Than 400' Were Laid Off At FAA Despite Rising Air Accidents
data.description: Duffy said less than 400 probationary FAA employees were laid off, not including air traffic controllers or safety personnel.

data.title: TotalEnergies Powers Up With Air Liquide For Hydrogen Breakthrough
data.description: TotalEnergies partners with Air Liquide to develop green hydrogen projects in the Netherlands, aiming to reduce CO2 emissions.

data.title: BHP Earnings Fall As Iron Ore Prices Pressure Market Leader To Slash Dividend
data.description: BHP reported 23% decrease in half-year earnings due to iron ore market challenges. CEO acknowledged operational resilience. Confident about long-term demand for iron ore.

data.title: GOP Megadonor Ken Griffin's Citadel Scores 77% Return On Palantir Despite Trimming Stake, Doubles Down On These 4 'Mag 7' Stocks
data.description: Ken Griffin's Citadel Advisors slashed stake in S&P 500's top-performing stock of 2024, but its position still grew 77% in value during Q4.

data.title: Apple's iPhone SE 4 To Feature TSMC's In-House 5G Modem, But It May Lag Behind Qualcomm's Snapdragon X75
data.description: Apple is set to introduce its first in-house 5G modem, built by TSMC, in the iPhone SE 4, but reports suggest it may lack mmWave 5G support.
